message.content:
Explore the neural-search module and OpenSearch neural service to understand:

1. How existing endpoints are structured in `src/modules/rest/neural-search/neural-search.controller.ts` and `src/modules/rest/neural-search/neural-search.service.ts`
2. The existing `NEURAL_SEARCH_TAG_CATEGORY_IDS` constant in `src/constants/neural-search.constant.ts` - get the full content
3. How `searchProducts` works in `src/modules/opensearch/opensearch-neural.service.ts` - especially how it builds queries with filters (category filters, bool queries)
4. The `IOpensearchProduct` interface in `src/interfaces/opensearch-product.interface.ts`
5. Any existing DTOs in `src/dto/neural-search/`
6. The neural-search module registration in `src/modules/rest/neural-search/neural-search.module.ts`

Focus on understanding how category-based filtering could be added to the OpenSearch query. Look at the `primary_category_id` field usage and any existing category filter patterns.

Be very thorough - read all relevant files completely.

content.text: I'll explore the neural-search module and OpenSearch neural service thoroughly to understand the current structure and how category-based filtering works.
